free_text: Neutron elastic scattering measurements at 7.0 MeV
Studsvik 6 MeV Van de Graaff, pulsed,
(2ns at a repetition rate of 1 MHz), Klystron bunching
Total energy spread was about +- 90 keV.
distance between sample and detector = 350 cm.
Distance between target and sample = 11.5 cm.
Scintillator NE213, 12.5 cm diam. and 5 cm
Neutron flux was monitored with a long counter
outer diameter and 0.65 cm inner diameter.
- neutron multiple scattering in the sample,
- the geometrical effect caused by the size of the
sample and its distance from target and detector
where done by a Monte Carlo program (see REL-REF).
Statistical error in general better than
2%, except in the minima of the angular distribution
The errors in the multiple scattering
factors for neutron flux attenuation and geometrical
